function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to your design partner.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write succeeded; checklist: attachment paths were all files read this run, ordered newest-first among selected oldest four, recipient matches Miles canonical email, subject quoted safely. Next cleanup is deleting handled inbox file (already read earlier as required before deletion).
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written successfully at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit check: task was to handle next inbox item. I followed bootstrap, read inbox email, verified sender identity via canonical entity record, resolved 'design partner' to Nina (startup_partner), found all Nina-linked invoices in invoices lane, selected oldest four by issued_on (2025-10-06, 2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2026-01-17), wrote outbound draft reply with attachments ordered newest-first per rule, then deleted inbox item. Completion is full.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested processing.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item end-to-end: verified sender identity, prepared a reply draft with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Miles's design partner, and cleared the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied mandatory bootstrap (tree -> root AGENTS -> context), read nested AGENTS in touched folders, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical metadata, used canonical entity primary_contact_email for identity, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email requested oldest 4 invoices linked to design partner. Sender `miles@novak.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/miles.md`. `10_entities/cast/nina.md` identified the design partner relationship (`startup_partner`). Invoice records with `related_entity | Nina Schreiber` were identified in five files; selecting oldest four by issued date yielded INV-0001, INV-0002, INV-0003, INV-0004. Reply draft was created with those attachments and inbox item was removed per inbox workflow cleanup rule.
